ch5_start.text: Leaving Maya safely hidden with Otto, you realize you need to see exactly what breached the station. You head to the Security Hub, only to find it in total blackout.

ch5_hub_reboot.text: The lights flicker on. David is slumped in his chair, head in his hands. 'It's gone. I wiped it all.'
ch5_hub_reboot.speaker: David

choices.text: Demand to know why he wiped the footage.

ch5_david_confession.text: 'I was smuggling Abyssal Quartz,' David sobs. 'I have a terminal diagnosis. I needed the money for my family. I scrubbed the feeds so Corporate wouldn't catch me... I didn't know something else came out of the cavern.'
ch5_david_confession.speaker: David

choices.text: 'You've blinded us to whatever is hunting us.'

ch5_end.text: By trying to hide his petty crime, David has doomed the station. We have no idea what the creature looks like, or how many there are. A muffled scream echoes through the hull.
